templates.title: Template Library
templates.description: Pre-built workflows to get started in minutes. Click a template to open it in the builder.
templates.seoDescription: Pre-built workflow templates to get started in minutes.

serial-rag.title: Serial RAG
serial-rag.description: Reads a question from serial input, queries a knowledge base, and writes the retrieved results back to serial output.

smart-greenhouse.title: Smart Greenhouse
smart-greenhouse.description: Reads soil moisture and temperature from analog pins every 30 seconds. An AI controller decides whether to activate the water pump or heater via digital outputs. Configure your pin numbers to get started.

machine-repair-agent.title: Machine Repair Assistant
machine-repair-agent.description: On-device service agent that answers repair and diagnostic questions via serial. Retrieves relevant content from your uploaded repair manuals and guides the technician step-by-step.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Central control for all your projects and IoT devices
dashboard.seoDescription: Overview of your projects, metrics and workspace.

deployDialog.title: Deploy Workflow

method.pushHint: Send the workflow directly to the running engine over the local network.
method.bundleHint: Download the deploy bundle and apply it on the device manually.

method.pendingHint: Engine is still booting after the latest deployment. Download the bundle if you want to re-apply manually.
method.bootErrorHint: Engine reported a boot error. Download the bundle and re-apply on the device.
method.newAgentHint: A new agent has no running engine yet. Submit creates the agent and downloads the deploy bundle for manual install.

knowledgeBases.title: Knowledge Bases
knowledgeBases.description: Manage your RAG collections and documents

deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this collection? All documents and embeddings will be permanently removed.

create.title: Create Collection
create.description: Create a new knowledge base collection for document retrieval.
create.chunkOverlapRange: Must be between 0 and chunk size - 1
create.noEmbeddingModelsAvailable: No embedding models are currently available. Please contact support.

chat.title: Chat with Data

chat.noModelsAvailable: No chat models are currently available. Please contact support.

errors.noDocuments: This collection has no documents yet

empty.description: Upload your first document to start building the knowledge base

documents.processingStalledDescription: At least one document has been processing for over 5 minutes. Please try again or contact support.

monitoring.title: Device Activity
monitoring.description: View activity history for your devices
monitoring.selectDevicePlaceholder: Choose a device to view activity...
monitoring.noActivityDescription: Activity will appear here when the device performs actions

welcome.title: Welcome to ForestHub Agent Builder
welcome.subtitle: Build intelligent AI agents for your IoT devices — visually, no code required.
welcome.body: We'll give you a quick tour to show you how everything works. You can skip at any time.

dashboard.title: Your Workspace
dashboard.body: This is your dashboard — your central hub for projects, devices, and statistics. Everything you need is right here.

sidebar.title: Navigation
sidebar.body: The sidebar gives you access to all areas: Projects, Knowledge Bases, Templates, and Devices.

projects.title: Projects
projects.body: Here you'll find all your workflows. A project is a visual agent workflow that you can deploy to a device.

templates.title: Templates
templates.body: Start with ready-made templates instead of from scratch. Pick a template, customize it, and skip the groundwork.

templateLibrary.title: Template Library
templateLibrary.body: Each template is a pre-configured workflow for a specific use case — from simple RAG queries to sensor-driven AI control.

tryTemplate.title: Try It Out
tryTemplate.body: Click a template to open it in the Builder. You can try it out, customize it, and save it as your own project.

knowledgeBases.title: Knowledge Bases
knowledgeBases.body: Upload documents to create a knowledge base. Your agent can then retrieve relevant information via the RAG node.

devices.title: Devices
devices.body: Register your IoT devices (Arduino, ESP32) and monitor their status. Deploy your workflows directly to registered devices.

completion.title: You're All Set!
completion.body: You now know the key areas. Start with a template — pick one and customize it for your use case.

agentTask.description: Assigns a task with a prompt to an agent

agentChoice.description: A path the agent can choose based on its description

agentDelegate.description: Allows an agent to hand off control to another agent

pinNumber.description: Number of the pin to read

outputName.description: Name for the generated output variable

SerialRead.description: Read a string from serial interface

prompt.description: Prompt for the serial read operation

outputName.description: Variable name for the read value

Retriever.description: Retrieves relevant documents from a knowledge base

collectionId.description: The knowledge base collection to search

outputName.description: Variable name for the retrieved results

pinNumber.description: Number of the pin to write to

value.description: Value to write to the pin

SerialWrite.description: Write a string to serial interface

value.description: Expression for the value to write

OnIdle.description: Triggers when the system enters idle state

OnFunctionCall.description: Triggers when this function is called by a function call node

Delay.description: Pauses execution for a specified duration and triggers when the delay completes. Other node chains can execute during this pause.

Ticker.description: Triggers repeatedly at a fixed interval

Alarm.description: Triggers at a scheduled time on selected weekdays

time.description: Time of day to trigger (24-hour format)

days.description: Weekdays to trigger on (empty = every day)

OnStartup.description: Triggers once when the device powers on

OnPinChange.description: Triggers when a pin value changes

outputName.description: Variable name that holds the pin value when the trigger fires

mode.description: Whether to read the pin as digital or analog

edge.description: Which edge transition triggers the event

direction.description: Direction of threshold crossing that triggers the event

OnThreshold.description: Triggers when an expression value crosses a threshold

direction.description: Direction of threshold crossing that triggers the event

model.description: AI model for the cloud agent

instructions.description: Instructions for the cloud agent as system prompt

If.description: Conditional branching based on boolean expression

SetVariable.description: Assign a new value to an existing variable

WebSearchTool.description: Provides web search functionality for connected agents

maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return

searchDomain.description: Optional domain to restrict the search

bundle.label: Deployment bundle
bundle.hint: docker-compose.yml + manifest.json + README.md. Required for every deployment.

image.label: Engine image
image.hint: Docker image tarball (~10 MB). Only needed if the controller doesn't already have it.
image.archHint: Choose the architecture of your target controller.

online.tooltipPending: Engine is booting after the latest deployment

loadedManifest.title: Device manifest
loadedManifest.bootError: Engine reported a boot error. Loaded manifest may be incomplete or empty.
loadedManifest.pending: Engine is booting — waiting for boot callback.
loadedManifest.offlineHint: Last known state — agent is currently offline.

preflightReason.device-not-member: Device is not a member of this network

error.rateLimit: Download limit reached. Try again later.
